title: Post-017 Host Browser Runtime Readiness Decision
objective: Decide whether the published Operations Visibility PM review authority chain plus current Olares host capability is sufficient to open a bounded host-side browser-runtime static-surface smoke packet.
decision_rationale: After Packet 017 publication and resync, `/home/olares/.cache/ms-playwright` remains absent on Olares.

`@playwright/test` resolves as `missing` on the Olares host after the Packet 017 resync, so the host cannot truthfully open the browser static-surface smoke without separate package or toolchain reopening.

Opening `apps/operations-web/tests/browser-shell.static-surfaces.smoke.spec.ts` from the host would therefore violate the current no-install boundary rather than extend the proven Olares-hosted validation lane.
The correct next move is a separate decision on whether to reopen a bounded browser-runtime toolchain lane at all, not silent broadening into browser provisioning.
next_packet_candidate: Olares Dev Residency 019 - Host Browser Runtime Toolchain Reopening Decision
closure_note: Executed 2026-05-05 as a post-publication decision-only packet. Host-side browser-runtime execution remains closed because the Olares host lacks both Playwright browser cache and `@playwright/test` package resolution after Packet 017 resync.
next_action: Use Packet 019 to decide explicitly whether to reopen a separate host browser-runtime toolchain lane or keep host browser-runtime work closed.
